welcome.title: Welcome to a new era of private messaging!
welcome.feature1: Cutting-edge E2EE end-to-end encryption across all communications.
welcome.feature2: We cannot know who you chat with or what you say.
welcome.feature3: We cannot access your nickname, avatar, or even friend information.
welcome.feature4: Industry-first advanced encrypted cloud storage — protecting not just conversations, but all your data.
welcome.feature5: Chip-as-identity concept — no one can track you via phone number or email.
welcome.e2eeDescription: Uses E2EE end-to-end encryption technology. All encryption/decryption is computed on the frontend. The server only stores encrypted information. All sensitive data is kept in memory only and cleared immediately when navigating away.

push.settingsDesc: Receive a system notification when new messages arrive
push.explainBody:
Push notifications will alert you when new messages arrive, even when the app is closed.

• Only displays "You have a new message" — message content is never sent to the notification server (E2EE protected)
• You will be asked to grant notification permission
• iOS users must first add this app to the Home Screen (Safari → Share → Add to Home Screen)
• Requires iOS 16.4 or later
push.permissionDenied: Notification permission was denied. Please allow notifications in your browser settings.
push.iosRequiresPWADetail:
To enable push notifications on iOS, you must first add this app to the Home Screen:

1. Tap the Share button (square with arrow) in Safari
2. Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
3. Open the app from the Home Screen
4. Log in and enable push notifications from Settings

This is an iOS system requirement — Web Push only works in standalone (Home Screen) mode.
push.iosStep4: Open from Home Screen and enter PIN
push.revokeConfirm: Revoke push notifications for this device? It will no longer receive new message alerts.
push.statusActiveDetail: This device will receive notifications when new messages arrive.
push.statusInactiveDetail: Enable push notifications from the app settings after logging in.
push.statusDeniedDetail: Please allow notifications in your browser or system settings, then re-enable push notifications.
push.statusUnsupportedDetail: This browser does not support push notifications.
push.disableConfirm: Disable push notifications on this device?
push.openInBrowser: Open in browser to use full features
push.infoBasic1: Push notifications only display "You have a new message" — message content is never included
push.infoBasic2: All message content is protected by end-to-end encryption — the server cannot read it
push.infoBasic3: Push is only triggered when you are not actively using the app; otherwise real-time connection is used
push.infoIOS1: You must add this app to the Home Screen to receive push notifications (Safari → Share button → Add to Home Screen)
push.infoIOS3: iOS manages notifications in the background automatically — the app does not need to stay running
push.infoIOS4: Some iOS versions may occasionally delay notifications (usually delivered within seconds)
push.infoAndroid1: Best support — notifications work even after closing the browser
push.infoAndroid2: You must tap "Allow" in the browser permission prompt
push.infoAndroid3: If you previously blocked notifications, go to browser Settings > Site Settings > Notifications to re-allow
push.infoDesktop1: Notifications work after closing the browser (browser background process must be running)
push.infoDesktop2: macOS users: ensure notifications are allowed for the browser in System Settings > Notifications
push.infoUnsupported1: Firefox on iOS (only Safari/Chrome support push on iOS)
push.infoReliability1: Web Push is relayed by platform push servers (Apple APNs / Google FCM / Mozilla)
push.infoReliability2: Delivery rate is approximately 90%+; in rare cases notifications may be delayed by a few minutes
push.infoReliability3: This is a supplementary feature — please open the app periodically to check for important messages
push.pinInstruction: Enter this PIN in the Home Screen app
push.pinEnrollDesc: Enter the 6-digit PIN from the app to activate push notifications on this device.
push.pinVerifyFailed: PIN verification failed. It may have expired — generate a new one from the app.
push.keepSessionAliveDesc: Prevent auto-logout while switching to the Home Screen app
push.notifyTypeMessageDesc: Private conversations with contacts — text, images, videos, and files
push.notifyTypeGroupChatDesc: Messages in multi-member groups — text, images, videos, and files
push.notifyTypeEphemeralDesc: Self-destructing conversations — text and images (up to 5 MB)
push.notifyTypeCallDesc: Voice or video call invitations from private or ephemeral chats
push.notifyTypeSystemDesc: Friend requests, group member changes, read receipts, and other system events
push.previewDesc: Display sender name and message excerpt in push notifications
push.previewE2eDesc: Notification content is encrypted during transmission and only decrypted on this device. Neither the server nor the push service provider can read the content.
push.previewLockscreenWarn: When enabled, message previews may appear on your lock screen. Please check your device's lock screen notification settings.
